text: Scientists just discovered a monster black hole collision. It's the biggest that we've ever seen. Two black holes of masses 100 and 140 times our sun collided with each other billions of light years away. Meanwhile, here on Earth, two different observatories were shining lasers down these concrete tubes four kilometers long when they noticed a tiny change in that light. When they analyzed it, they saw that we were feeling ripples in the fabric of the universe called gravitational waves that were caused by those two black holes colliding and creating a combined black hole weighing 225 times our sun, which we know about by shooting lasers down concrete tubes to go inside those tunnels.
